utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Do you guys know any cute guys ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well , of course I do ! My good friend Joey over here .

emotion_cause.span: 4_Well , of course I do ! My good friend Joey over here .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh , I am sorry . Thank you Chandler .

emotion_cause.span: 4_Well , of course I do ! My good friend Joey over here .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Anyway , there is this big charity ball this weekend and Ralph Lauren bought a table , so I kinda have to go

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I do not know , something either trees or disease ... Ralph mumbles a lot .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Does Ralph mumble when you are not paying attention ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Yeah ! It is weird . But the thing is need to find a date .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Well , what kind of guy are you looking for ?
